cover.subtitle:
백제의 미소, 신라의 비례,
흙·돌·금동의 천 년.
cover.imagePrompt: Ancient Korean Buddha statue illustration, 7th century. ONE seated bronze pensive bodhisattva (Bangasayusang) figure with one leg crossed and a finger touching the cheek, half-smiling, set in a softly lit stone niche. Around the niche, faintly carved cliff-side rock suggests Seosan rock-carved triad. Composition: serene, intimate. Color: aged gilt + bronze + clay-brown + warm amber halo. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"서산 미소 · 석굴암 비례 · 은진 거대"
시대별 키워드를 묶는다.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 불상 사진을 보고 시대·재료·국가를 묻는다. 백제(서산 마애·금동 반가)·통일신라(석굴암·소조)·고려(관촉사 은진미륵·철불)의 양식 변화를 사진과 함께 정리할 것. 반가사유상의 일본 고류지 영향도 단골 포인트.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized seated Buddha silhouette icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small stone niche frame silhouette suggesting Seokguram dome. Cream #F2EDE3 base + warm amber #C9A24A accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
